mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectAlimUnrdCnt 설 명 : 알림 유형별 읽지 않은 건수 조회 */ SELECT NVL(PUSH_CNT, 0) AS PUSH_CNT, NVL(SMS_CNT, 0) AS SMS_CNT, NVL(SHRTNT_CNT, 0) AS SHRTNT_CNT, NVL(ALIMTALK_CNT, 0) AS ALIMTALK_CNT, NVL(PUSH_CNT, 0) + NVL(SMS_CNT, 0) + NVL(SHRTNT_CNT, 0) + NVL(ALIMTALK_CNT, 0) AS TOTAL_UNRD_CNT FROM ( SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG WHERE RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'PUSH' AND READ_DTTM IS NULL) AS PUSH_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG WHERE RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'SMS' AND READ_DTTM IS NULL) AS SMS_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG WHERE RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND READ_DTTM IS NULL AND RCVR_DELYN = 'N') AS SHRTNT_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG WHERE RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'ALIM_TALK' AND READ_DTTM IS NULL) AS ALIMTALK_CNT FROM DUAL )

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectShrtntList 설 명 : 쪽지 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGR_ID, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, A.READ_DTTM, CASE WHEN A.READ_DTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.RCVR_DELYN = 'N' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectPushList 설 명 : PUSH 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, A.READ_DTTM, CASE WHEN A.READ_DTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'PUSH' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectSmsList 설 명 : SMS 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, A.READ_DTTM, CASE WHEN A.READ_DTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'SMS' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.selectAlimtalkList 설 명 : 알림톡 최근 목록 조회 */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT A.MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID AS SNDNG_ID, A.MSG_ID, S.SBJCTNM, A.SNDNGNM, A.SNDNG_TTL, A.SNDNG_CTS, A.SNDNG_DTTM, A.READ_DTTM, CASE WHEN A.READ_DTTM IS NULL THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS READ_YN, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SNDNG_DTTM DESC) AS RNUM FROM TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_MSG M ON A.MSG_ID = M.MSG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT S ON M.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND A.MBL_SNDNG_TYCD = 'ALIM_TALK' ) WHERE RNUM <= #{listCnt}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.modifyShrtntReadDttm 설 명 : 쪽지 읽음 처리 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG SET READ_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MDFR_ID = #{userId}, MOD_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE MSG_SHRTNT_SNDNG_ID = #{sndngId} AND RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND READ_DTTM IS NULL

/* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.modifyMblReadDttm 설 명 : 모바일 알림 읽음 처리 */ UPDATE TB_LMS_MSG_MBL_SNDNG SET READ_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), MDFR_ID = #{userId}, MOD_DTTM = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') WHERE MSG_MBL_SNDNG_ID = #{sndngId} AND RCVR_ID = #{userId} AND READ_DTTM IS NULL
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : MsgAlimDAO.registMsg 설 명 : 메시지 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_MSG ( MSG_ID, SBJCT_ID, MSG_TMPLT_ID, MSG_TYCD, MSG_CTS_GBNCD, DGRS_YR, SMSTR, TTL, TXT_CTS, HTML_CTS, SNDNG_ONLYYN, MSG_TAGNM, REQ_SDTTM, REQ_EDTTM, RSRV_SNDNG_SDTTM, RSRV_SNDNG_CNCL_DTTM, RSRV_SNDNG_CNCL_RSN, SNDNG_RETRY_MAX_CNT, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{msgId}, #{sbjctOfrngId}, #{msgTmpltId}, #{msgTycd}, #{msgCtsGbncd}, #{dgrsYr}, #{smstr}, #{ttl}, #{txtCts}, #{htmlCts}, NVL(#{sndngOnlyyn}, 'N'), #{msgTagnm}, #{reqSdttm}, #{reqEdttm}, #{rsrvSndngSdttm}, #{rsrvSndngCnclDttm}, #{rsrvSndngCnclRsn}, #{sndngRetryMaxCnt}, #{rgtrId}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), #{mdfrId}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
